creator: arrowd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Florian Walpen from comment #28)
> Never got wayland to run here, so can't test.

Same here. AFAIK, Plasma doesn't work with Wayland on FreeBSD. Also not sure about SDDM side, maybe its Wayland support is also bugged. We at $WORK are hoping to move to Wayland someday, but that's all blue.
